brand-story-bg-d4e5f6.query: Where Craft Meets Conscience Velmora was born from a simple belief: that beautiful jewelry shouldn't cost the earth. Each piece is thoughtfully designed in our studio, crafted with 18K gold plating over recycled brass, and finished with the kind of care that turns accessories into heirlooms.
